tasks.title: Create standardized README.md with project overview and setup instructions
tasks.description: Create README.md at the project root with sections: Project Title, Description, Installation, Usage, Development, Testing, Contributing, License. Follow software industry best practices for structure and clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md contains all standard sections with clear instructions
README.md is formatted in markdown with proper headings and lists
tasks.expectedResult: README.md file exists with comprehensive and clear project documentation following industry standards

outputPlan.description: Standardized project README with overview, setup, usage, and contribution guidelines

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides clear project documentation for users and contributors

tasks.title: Initialize and configure git repository with standard .gitignore and commit guidelines
tasks.description: Initialize git repo if not already done. Create or update .gitignore with standard Node.js ignores and IDE/editor files. Add commit message guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md or docs/commit-guidelines.md.
acceptanceCriteria: .gitignore file exists with standard Node.js and editor ignores
Commit guidelines document exists with clear instructions
tasks.expectedResult: Git repository initialized with proper .gitignore and commit guidelines document

outputPlan.description: Standard .gitignore file for Node.js and common editors

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Sets up version control with standard ignores and commit practices

tasks.title: Add CodeGraph configuration and integration for codebase visualization
tasks.description: Create codegraph configuration file (e.g., codegraph.config.json or .codegraphrc) with settings to analyze src/ directory. Add npm script 'codegraph' to package.json to run codegraph CLI. Document usage in README.md under a new 'CodeGraph' section.
acceptanceCriteria: CodeGraph config file exists with correct settings
README.md updated with CodeGraph usage instructions
tasks.expectedResult: CodeGraph is configured and integrated with npm scripts and documented usage

outputPlan.description: CodeGraph configuration file for project source analysis
Add npm script for running CodeGraph

metadata.inputContext: Needs git repo setup and README.md created
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables codebase visualization and analysis tooling integration

tasks.title: Validate project setup by running lint, typecheck, and tests
tasks.description: Run configured lint, typecheck, and test commands to ensure project setup is correct and no errors exist after documentation and config additions.
tasks.expectedResult: All quality checks pass confirming stable and standard-compliant project setup

metadata.inputContext: Needs all previous setup tasks completed
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms project setup is correct and ready for development
